creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
New version of libmikmod, requires only a new md5 checksum, compiled and
installed (and deinstalled) perfectly fine. mharo, I'll leave it up to you
to determine if the fix is appropriate (since I didn't really know of a
quick way to test whether it's working properly or not.)

How-To-Repeat: 
Apply the diff to the current port.
